payload.answer: I can’t determine which specific AI-memory articles you’ve saved from the provided information. Please share the saved-item list or the article titles/IDs so I can recall them accurately.

entity_resolution.reason: No concrete article titles, identifiers, or saved-item records are provided in the input; only an overview of record categories is mentioned.

payload.intent: Recall and list the AI-memory-related articles the user has saved.

memory_cards.statement: User asks: What articles have I saved about AI memory?

details: No actual saved article metadata is included in the fixture input.
Therefore, article enumeration cannot be performed without additional data.

repair_options: Provide the list of saved articles (titles/URLs/IDs) or the relevant snippet from your saved-items records.
Tell me where Brain stores saved articles (collection/table name) so I can reference that source.
If you have a specific subset (e.g., Brain/Cognee chat vs. an AI memory article), specify which one.
